message:
test(mcp): add builtin_workflows drift-detection tests for both MCP surfaces

- mcp.rs: Replace weak >=5 assertion with exact count (10), add 3 new tests:
  builtin_workflows_names_complete (all 10 workflow names present),
  builtin_workflows_all_have_descriptions (no empty descriptions),
  builtin_workflows_unique_names (no duplicates)
- mcp_helpers.rs: Add 2 new tests: helpers_builtin_workflows_count (exact 10),
  helpers_builtin_workflows_names_match_mcp (same names as mcp.rs)

These tests catch future drift between the two builtin_workflows surfaces
(mcp.rs and mcp_helpers.rs) and ensure new handlers are registered in both.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
